Configuration:
  pulumi:pulumi:Stack: (same)
    [urn=urn:pulumi:dev::myproject::pulumi:pulumi:Stack::myproject-dev]
    + aws:s3/bucket:Bucket: (create)
        [urn=urn:pulumi:dev::myproject::aws:s3/bucket:Bucket::completed-bucket]
        acl: "private"
        --outputs:--
        arn: "arn:aws:s3:::completed-bucket-1234567"
    + my:component:WebService: (create)
        [urn=urn:pulumi:dev::myproject::my:component:WebService::interrupted-component]
        + aws:ec2/instance:Instance: (create)
            [urn=urn:pulumi:dev::myproject::aws:ec2/instance:Instance::interrupted-instance]
            ami         : "ami-12345678"
            instanceType: "t3.micro"
    ~ aws:rds/instance:Instance: (update)
        [id=interrupted-db-7654321]
        [urn=urn:pulumi:dev::myproject::aws:rds/instance:Instance::interrupted-db]
      ~ instanceClass: "db.t3.micro" => "db.t3.small"
